2604.14609.title: El Agente Forjador: Task-Driven Agent Generation for Quantum Simulation
2604.14609.paper_summary: AI for science promises to accelerate the discovery process. The advent of large language models (LLMs) and agentic workflows enables the expediting of a growing range of scientific tasks. However, most of the current generation of agentic systems depend on static, hand-curated toolsets that hinder adaptation to new domains and evolving libraries. We present El Agente Forjador, a multi-agent framework in which universal coding agents autonomously forge, validate, and reuse computational tools through a four-stage workflow of tool analysis, tool generation, task execution, and iterative solution evaluation. Evaluated across 24 tasks spanning quantum chemistry and quantum dynamics on five coding agent setups, we compare three operating modes: zero-shot generation of tools per task, reuse of a curriculum-built toolset, and direct problem-solving with the coding agents as the baseline. We find that our tool generation and reuse framework consistently improves accuracy over the baseline. We also show that reusing a toolset built by a stronger coding agent can reduce API cost and substantially raises the solution quality for weaker coding agents. Case studies further demonstrate that tools forged for different domains can be combined to solve hybrid tasks. Taken together, these results show that LLM-based agents can use their scientific knowledge and coding capabilities to autonomously build reusable scientific tools, pointing toward a paradigm in which agent capabilities are defined by the tasks they are designed to solve rather than by explicitly engineered implementations.
2604.14609.paper_summary_zh: AI 在科學領域的應用承諾加速發現過程。大型語言模型（LLMs）和自主工作流程的出現使得越來越多的科學任務得以加速。然而，當前大多數自主系統依賴於靜態的、手動策劃的工具集，這阻礙了它們適應新領域和不斷發展的庫。我們提出了 El Agente Forjador，一個多代理框架，其中通用編碼代理自主地鍛造、驗證和重用計算工具，通過工具分析、工具生成、任務執行和迭代解決方案評估的四個階段工作流程。通過在五個編碼代理設置上評估涵蓋量子化學和量子動力學的 24 個任務，我們比較了三種操作模式：每個任務的零樣本工具生成、重用課程構建的工具集，以及以編碼代理為基準的直接問題解決。我們發現，我們的工具生成和重用框架在準確性上始終優於基準。我們還顯示，重用由更強大的編碼代理構建的工具集可以降低 API 成本，並顯著提高較弱編碼代理的解決方案質量。案例研究進一步證明，為不同領域鍛造的工具可以結合起來解決混合任務。綜合這些結果顯示，基於 LLM 的代理可以利用其科學知識和編碼能力自主構建可重用的科學工具，指向一種新範式，其中代理的能力由其設計用來解決的任務定義，而不是由明確工程實現定義。
2604.14609.author: Zijian Zhang et.al.
2604.14609.authors: Zijian Zhang, Aiwei Yin, Amaan Baweja, Jiaru Bai, Ignacio Gustin, Varinia Bernales, Alán Aspuru-Guzik
